languages.text: На земле начертаны непонятные символы и воззвания к Богу-Императору на низком готике.
Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.
languages.original_text: На земле начертаны непонятные символы и воззвания к Богу-Императору на низком готике.

traits.locale_text: Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.
Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.
Carved into the ground are occult symbols and something in High Gothic mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor.
Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.
Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.

languages.text: 地面には、神帝への祈りとハイゴシックの要素が混ざったオカルトのシンボルが刻まれている。
languages.original_text: Carved into the ground are occult symbols and something in High Gothic mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor.

traits.locale_text: 地面には、神帝への祈りとハイゴシックの要素が混ざったオカルトのシンボルが刻まれている。

languages.text: Yere, Adi Gotik dilinde Tanrı İmparator'a yakarışlar da içeren karışık tuhaf semboller kazınmış.
languages.original_text: Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: Yere, Adi Gotik dilinde Tanrı İmparator'a yakarışlar da içeren karışık tuhaf semboller kazınmış.

languages.text: Grabados en el suelo, ves símbolos extraños y mezclados con invocaciones en Bajo Gótico al Dios Emperador.
languages.original_text: Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: Grabados en el suelo, ves símbolos extraños y mezclados con invocaciones en Bajo Gótico al Dios Emperador.

languages.text: 地上刻着奇怪的符号，还混杂着用低哥特语写下的献给神皇的祷词。
languages.original_text: Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: 地上刻着奇怪的符号，还混杂着用低哥特语写下的献给神皇的祷词。

languages.text: D'étranges symboles et des invocations adressées à l'Empereur-Dieu en bas gothique sont gravés sur le sol.
languages.original_text: Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: D'étranges symboles et des invocations adressées à l'Empereur-Dieu en bas gothique sont gravés sur le sol.

languages.text: Seltsame Symbole und verschiedene Gebete an den Gottimperator sind in den Boden geritzt.
languages.original_text: Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: Seltsame Symbole und verschiedene Gebete an den Gottimperator sind in den Boden geritzt.
